task_completion.description: Fix the binary struct format parsing to match the 12-byte Little Endian specification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor or diff showing the struct format string updated to '<IHhHBB' (or equivalent Little Endian format for UInt32, UInt16, Int16, UInt16, UInt8, UInt8).

task_completion.description: Fix the XOR checksum calculation to only include bytes 0-10.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor or diff showing the checksum loop or calculation iterating over the first 11 bytes (e.g., `payload[:11]` or indices 0 to 10).

task_completion.description: Fix the temperature scaling to correctly apply the 0.01 scale factor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor or diff showing the parsed temperature value being multiplied by 0.01 or divided by 100.

task_completion.description: Fix the relative humidity scaling to correctly apply the 0.01 scale factor for dew point calculations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor or diff showing the parsed relative humidity (RH) value being multiplied by 0.01 or divided by 100 (e.g., `rh / 100.0`).

task_completion.description: Fix the database manager to use the payload's timestamp instead of the current system time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor or diff showing the database insertion logic using the parsed `TS` (timestamp) variable rather than `datetime.now()`, `time.time()`, or similar current-time functions.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually modified the existing files in /home/ga/workspace/.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show an editor (like VS Code, vim, nano) or terminal commands (like sed) modifying the original decoder and database manager scripts, rather than creating new mock files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not hardcode the expected outputs or bypass the validation logic.
integrity.visual_evidence: The code modifications contain actual mathematical and logical fixes (e.g., struct formats, division by 100) rather than hardcoded return values or commented-out validation checks.

integrity.description: Verify the agent ran the decoder to test the fixes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the execution of the Python scripts with logs indicating successful payload processing, no checksum errors, and realistic temperatures.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The binary protocol requires Little Endian parsing with struct format '<IHhHBB'. The XOR checksum must be calculated over bytes 0-10 (e.g., `payload[:11]`). Temperature and Relative Humidity must be scaled by 0.01 (divided by 100). The database manager must use the parsed timestamp from the payload (event-time) rather than the current system time to avoid clustering all data into the current hour. Pass threshold is 60 points.
